ground.what_this_is: This is a mobile view of a live 'running chain'—a visual map showing exactly how data is flowing right now through your system.
ground.what_you_can_do: You can zoom in and out to see the full chain or just the active parts, and tap the 'Run' button at the bottom to trigger a new cycle.

howto.how_to_change: The text is a static annotation; changing the logic requires editing runtime/scheduler.py, but the visible text is not a code region.
howto.what: The memo gate on a node card, explaining when a node skips re-running.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the condition that allows the node to skip re-running based on its hash unchanged.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (canvas/app/src/regions/Toolbar.tsx); changing its behavior or label is a code change there.
howto.what: The 'Run' command button on the toolbar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Tap this to trigger a new cycle of the running chain, refreshing the live data flow visualization.

howto.how_to_change: This is a mockup-only overlay; no built code path maps to it yet.
howto.what: A visible instruction overlay on the live canvas board.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the mandatory rule governing how the current run must be answered (code-only, file-cited, concise).

howto.how_to_change: It is the 'Canvas' link in the .tabbar region (canvas/app/src/App.tsx); changing its label or icon is a code change there.
howto.what: The 'Canvas' navigation button in the mobile tabbar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Tap this to switch the view to the live 'running chain' map, where you can zoom and interact with the data flow visualization.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the canvas region (canvas/app/src/NodeShape.tsx); changing the text or presence state is a code edit there.
howto.what: The company name and status indicator at the top of the live board.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the system's identity and live presence state (running/thinking) at a glance; tap to focus on the company context.

reasons: refcheck (Layer 1, deterministic floor): feature fabrication: maps_to_feature 'CAN-brand' is not an inventory id nor 'proposed'
accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (0 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.
